description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house set within a fenced lot, featuring a main building with a prominent central entrance and two substantial wings extending on either side. The exterior is clad in light tan brick with a dark, multi-gabled roof, and the property includes a circular driveway leading to the main entry. The grounds are landscaped with several trees and bushes, and the perimeter is enclosed by a dark fence. Windows are arranged in regular, symmetrical rows, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small portico with steps and a paved approach. The house has multiple rooflines, including gable and hip elements, and several secondary entrances or garage doors are visible on the side wings. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern suburban architectural influences.
description: A large, two-story tan brick house with a dark gabled roof, symmetrical windows, and a circular driveway, set within a landscaped, fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a circular driveway, central portico, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended wing, garage doors, and additional landscaping along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrances, more windows, and a clear view of the fenced perimeter and backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary wing, additional entry points, and the continuation of the landscaped grounds.
attribute_architectural_style: Colonial Revival with modern suburban elements
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, small portico, and circular driveway approach
